pi_items.source: CONTRADICTION FOUND: seed_patients.sql line 152 shows Maria Santos with year_of_birth='1994', month_of_birth='04', date_of_birth='27'. However, setup_task.sh line 27 uses 1985-07-22. The setup script checks if patient exists (line 16) and only creates if not found. Since seed_patients.sql is loaded first (setup_oscar.sh lines 244-262), the seed patient with DOB 1994-04-27 will be found first, making the metadata claim of 1985-07-22 incorrect for the actual patient used.
